postReview.title: LA Galaxy 0-2 San Diego: Expansion side stun MLS Cup holders on opening night
postReview.description: Two goals from Anders Dreyer secured San Diego's first-ever victory, coming away to 2024 MLS Cup winners LA Galaxy.

QAData.answer: San Diego FC won 2–0 over LA Galaxy on Mon, 24 Feb 2025 00:00:00 GMT.
